underlying_goal: Execute a comprehensive 10-phase integration fix plan to bridge front-end and back-end of the Anima project, raising feature delivery from ~58% to full closure across F1-F20 features
friction_detail: Phase 10 (xsAI removal) was only partially done as a default-switch rather than full removal, which the user explicitly wanted as complete removal; also an API connectivity error interrupted Phase 8 sub-agent work.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to execute a 10-phase integration fix plan for the Anima project; Phases 1-9 were completed but Phase 10 (full xsAI removal) was only partially done, prompting user dissatisfaction and a request for complete removal.
